Hero.title: Sakha Ikamva
Hero.description: Ukusukela ngo-1972, iSebe leSayensi Yekhompyutha laseStellebosch liye labumba okuzayo — uphando oluphambili, ukufundisa okwenhlaba-jikelele, kunye nabaphumeleleyo abakhokela kwishishini nakwezolwazi.

Features.title: Kutheni ISayensi Yekhompyutha YaseStellebosch?
Features.subtitle: Fumana okwenza isebe lethu inkokheli kumfundo wesayensi yekhompyutha kunye nophando.
Features.worldClassDescription: Izidanga zangaphambili nezangasemva eziyilwe ukuvelisa abaphumeleleyo abalungele ishishini.
Features.researchDescription: Amaqela ophando asebenzayo kwi-AI, ukufunda koomatshini, isayensi yedatha kunye nokhuseleko lwesayibha.
Features.communityDescription: Indawo yokusebenzisana edibana nabafundi, izifundiswa kunye nabalingane beshishini.
Features.globalDescription: Abaphumeleleyo bethu basebenza kwinkampani eziphambili zobuchwepheshe namaziko ophando emhlabeni wonke.
Features.facultyDescription: Funda kubaphandi abaziwayo kwihlabathi liphela nakubafundisi abamava.
Features.handsOnDescription: Ikharikhyulam ezisekelwe kwiprojekthi ezikudibanisayo nemingeni yokwenene yobuchwepheshe besoftwe.

Programmes.title: Iinkqubo Zethu
Programmes.subtitle: Ukusuka kwiziseko zangaphambili ukuya kuphando lwasemva, fumana indlela efanelekileyo yomsebenzi wakho.
Programmes.bscDescription: Isidanga seminyaka emithathu esibonelela ngesiseko esiqinileyo kwi-algorithms, izixhobo kunye nobuchwepheshe besoftwe.
Programmes.honsDescription: Unyaka oqukuqelayo wee-onazi onesifundo esiphambili kunye neprojekthi yophando kwindawo ekhethekileyo.
Programmes.mscDescription: Iinkqubo zophando zasemva kweedigri ezikhokelwa zizifundiswa eziphambili kwimiba yokuqwalasela emininzi.

Contact.title: Qhagamshelana Nathi
Contact.description: Unemibuzo malunga neenkqubo zethu, uphando okanye nantoni na enye? Singavuya ukuva kuwe.

Metadata.title: ISayensi Yekhompyutha - IYunivesithi YaseStellebosch
Metadata.description: Iwebhusayithi yeSebe leSayensi Yekhompyutha kwiYunivesithi yaseStellebosch. Hlola iinkqubo zethu, uphando kunye noluntu.
